tagline: Air-suction pulses designed to find your sweet spot. So good, you'll scream.
description: Meet Lem - your zesty new playmate for intimate moments. This clitoral massager is perfect for those exploring air suction bliss for the first time, promising longer, more powerful and deeply satisfying orgasms. This happy little lemon combines pleasure with discretion. Featuring 12 unique intensities and patterns, Lem is an ideal choice for those looking for a fresh twist.
